envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. RULE 0 sovereignty over memory is absolute. Baseline DMW safety is never paywalled.

items.name: Memory / DMW Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed DMW scope regions (baseline DMW safety / self-scoped memory / team-scoped memory / project-scoped / customer-scoped / forbidden categories).
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which memory categories admins should approve. Baseline DMW safety is always included. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
items.model_usage_notes: Baseline DMW safety + self-scoped memory rank HIGH_CONFIDENCE because they ship in every plan. Team / project / customer scopes require admin approval. Forbidden categories absolute.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Baseline safety ships in every plan per ADR-0083; never paywalled.
Team scope requires admin approval of Hive membership + Org Map relationships.
Customer-by-customer scope binding required; sensitive projects excluded.
Forbidden categories from assessment intake remain absolute downstream.

items.rationale: Baseline DMW safety + self-scoped memory ship always. Team / project / customer scopes require admin approval. Forbidden categories are absolute. Per ADR-0046 dual-context: Personal AI Agent → PERSONAL wallet; Enterprise AI Agent → ENTERPRISE wallet.
cross_map_dependencies: Memory / DMW Map depends on Role Map (per-role DMW scope per Wave 2.1 §25)
Memory / DMW Map depends on Risk Map (forbidden categories inherit from Risk Map exclusions)
Memory / DMW Map depends on Authority Map ('must never be assumed' surfaces exclude DMW scope)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin approval + user confirmation of self-scope boundaries.
DMW_scope_implications: Memory / DMW Map directly establishes DMW scope for activation
Forbidden categories cannot scope any DMW without explicit later authorization
Per ADR-0046: AI_AGENT EntityType maps to PERSONAL or ENTERPRISE wallet by deployment context
Advanced DMW governance pack required for custom retention per ADR-0083
governance_review_points: RULE 0 sovereignty over entity memory absolute
Baseline DMW safety never paywalled per ADR-0083
Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe
User must confirm self-scoped memory boundaries
Admin must approve team / org / project / customer regions
